epics.title: Admin Billing Access — SUPER_ADMIN-Only
epics.note: 8 atomic tasks across 5 phases (avg complexity 2.1). Extracted from SPEC-155 T-002. WIDE revoke (19 perms) + mainMenu hide + onMissing:'hide'/re-gate leaks + 14-page beforeLoad guards + seed/integration/degradation tests. OQ-1=WIDE, OQ-2=Option B (both resolved). Renderer-wiring confirmed: comercialSidebar renders on direct /billing/* URL regardless of mainMenu, so T-005 is strictly required. HOST self-billing (protected tier) verified unaffected.

epics.title: Role Permission Audit + Owner-Scoped Data Access
epics.archiveNote: Shipped 32/32. HOST accommodation read-leak closed (VIEW_ALL→VIEW_OWN + forced server-side owner-scoping + 404 anti-enum + /options tier + front guard + AC-6 systemic guard). Live e2e smoke passed. Merged via owner override over preexisting ajeno CI red (admin/lint/build, predates branch). SPEC-170 (per-user permission panel) spun off.
epics.note: Atomized into 32 tasks (avg complexity 2.3, 6 phases) via task-from-spec. T-003 owner-review GATE + §12 checkpoints. Backbone: audit → schema _VIEW_OWN → service forced owner-scoping on adminList + _canAdminView on getById + ownership resolver → seed (HOST VIEW_ALL→VIEW_OWN, EDITOR rationale, CLIENT_MANAGER untouched) → /options endpoints + selector migration → beforeLoad guard → AC-1..AC-11 tests. Read-only data-leak fix.

epics.title: Per-User Granular Permission Management Panel

Backend per-user permission overrides already exists (user_permission table + PermissionService + actor merge); missing = admin UI grant/revoke (stub at /access/users/:id/permissions) + API endpoints + categorized picker. epics.title: Cron Run History
epics.completionRef: PR #1310 + PR #1317 + PR #1322 (merge d94188a54) — all merged to staging
epics.note: Backend-only. Persist per-cron-execution results (cron_runs table) + admin read endpoints (list/detail/summary) + differentiated purge cron (success>60d, failed/timeout>180d). Single hook at 2 execution sites (bootstrap + cron-admin trigger). Fire-and-forget recording. Enables SPEC-155 ADMIN card D. Progress shown nominal (task-master tracking was not wired; delivered via 3 PRs).
